message:
test(proptest): add 39 property tests for beads_bridge coverage gaps

Covers backpressure tier determination (monotonicity, boundaries,
determinism), BeadsBackpressureConfig defaults/custom, BeadStatusCounts
(total, actionable, from_summaries consistency), BeadSummary properties,
resolve_bead_readiness DAG invariants, and serde roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
